input.cmd:
cat > slugify.py <<'PY'
import re
import sys

text = " ".join(sys.argv[1:])
print(re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text.lower()).strip("-"))
PY

cat > slugify.py <<'PY'
import re
import sys

text = " ".join(sys.argv[1:])
print(re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text.lower()).strip("-"))
PY

evidence: Success command: python slugify.py "Hello World!" | grep -q '^hello-world$'
